zh.Macetown, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯馬瑟托
zh., Meath, Leinster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Dillon於1400年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯時，他的父親Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon26歲，母親Anne Birmingham26歲。他和Jeane Wile至少有6個兒子。他去世於1456年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Dillon于1400年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯时，他的父亲Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon26岁，母亲Anne Birmingham26岁。他和Jeane Wile至少有6个儿子。他去世于1456年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Dillon was born in 1400, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon, was 26 and his mother, Anne Birmingham, was 26. He had at least 6 sons with Jeane Wile. He died in 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Dillon est né en 1400, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Birmingham, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Jeane Wile. Il est décédé en 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Dillon 1400 in Diocese of Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon 26 und seine Mutter Anne Birmingham 26. Er hatte mit Jeane Wile mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1456 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Dillon è nato il nel 1400 nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne Birmingham, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Jeane Wile. Morì nel 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Macetown, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスマセトウン
ja., Meath, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアス
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Dillonが1400年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillonは26歳，母Anne Birminghamは26歳であった。彼はJeane Wileとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1456年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Dillon(이)가 1400년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Birmingham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Jeane Wile(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1456년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Dillon nasceu em 1400, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Birmingham, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Jeane Wile. Ele faleceu em 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Dillon родился в 1400 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Birmingham, 26. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Jeane Wile. Он умер в 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Dillon nació en 1400, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Birmingham, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Jeane Wile. Murió en 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
